en_body:
I have seen within me the immensity
GOD: who is
 Love without ending..!!
like a crystalline manifestation,
making the slender white columns of the Chapel
suddenly soar high, and lift the ceiling
its white arched dome
and all suddenly vast without boundary
and flooded with Light: within and without me...

The resplendent Light overflowing
blinds my eyes
I reach with my body/Soul
stretch wide my eyes to swallow the Light..!!

Bathing, encompassed in the crystalline realm
I suddenly fold myself, prostrate and weep senseless
because the Truth is too clear
cutting close the waiting Heart until it bleeds
each wound of The One upon the cross piercing the Soul numb:

But because of this: The Answer: Life:
So wondrously sings me into a life filled with Hope
And I softly say that:
"Love human beings so much, and contain one another..!!"

(UniversityOfHouston: Houston, TX, USA: 1981)
note: The vision braids Christian chapel and Crucifixion imagery with a mystical inward revelation of GOD as inexhaustible Love.
